def enqueue_activation(
    db,
    *,
    source_node_id,
    cause,
    payload=None,
    correlation_id=None,
    now=None,
):
    cid = correlation_id or str(uuid.uuid4())
    if pending_queue_depth(db) >= MAX_PENDING_QUEUE_DEPTH:
        return -1
    if correlation_event_count(db, cid) >= MAX_EVENTS_PER_CORRELATION:
        return -1
    created_at = now or datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    if created_at.tzinfo is not None:
        created_at = created_at.astimezone(timezone.utc).replace(tzinfo=None)
    event = Event(
        id=max((item.id for item in db.events), default=0) + 1,
        source_node_id=source_node_id,
        cause=cause,
        payload=dict(payload or {}),
        correlation_id=cid,
        created_at=created_at,
    )
    db.add(event)
    db.flush()
    return event.id

def enqueue_activation(
    db,
    *,
    source_node_id,
    cause,
    payload=None,
    correlation_id=None,
    now=None,
):
    cid = correlation_id or str(uuid.uuid4())
    if pending_queue_depth(db) >= MAX_PENDING_QUEUE_DEPTH:
        stale_events = [
            event for event in db.events
            if event.status == "pending" and not event.locked and (now - event.created_at).total_seconds() >= 1800
        ]
        if stale_events:
            oldest_stale_event = min(stale_events, key=lambda e: e.created_at)
            oldest_stale_event.status = "dead"
            oldest_stale_event.audit_metadata = {"refreshed": True}
            db.flush()

    if pending_queue_depth(db) >= MAX_PENDING_QUEUE_DEPTH:
        return -1
    if correlation_event_count(db, cid) >= MAX_EVENTS_PER_CORRELATION:
        return -1
    created_at = now or datetime.now(timezone.utc)
    if created_at.tzinfo is not None:
        created_at = created_at.astimezone(timezone.utc).replace(tzinfo=None)
    event = Event(
        id=max((item.id for item in db.events), default=0) + 1,
        source_node_id=source_node_id,
        cause=cause,
        payload=dict(payload or {}),
        correlation_id=cid,
        created_at=created_at,
    )
    db.add(event)
    db.flush()
    return event.id
